sales.description:
Ancients
Delmatius, as Caesar (AD 335-337). AE3/4 or BI nummus (15mm, 12h). NGC AU. Constantinople, 10th officina, AD 336-337. FL DELMATIVS NOB C, laureate, cuirassed bust of Delmatius right, seen from front / GLOR-IA EXERC-ITVS, two soldiers standing facing, head turned inward, grounded reversed spear in outer hand, resting inner hand on grounded shield; standard between them, CONSI in exergue. RIC VII 141.

Delmatius was the son of Constantine's half-brother, Flavius Delmatius, the son of Co...
